title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Perospero, Luffy, Unknown person #7, Chiffon as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The boat with the cake changed directions!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a miracle I thought it was the end for us thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Sanji, why were you on Bege's ship?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't know what will happen to big mom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After she eats the cake, so they're going to nearby island

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What? How come they're doing something so nice?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think they gave up on the idea of killing big mom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm fine as long as this ship is safe

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they are gonna take big mom with them, even better

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyways, it looks like everything is messed up here

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, even though I was here, we couldn't stop them

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop that! We'd be dead without you, jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sleeping!! They got tired from fighting and they're sleeping.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: brother Peros, what do you wanna do?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hats and Mama are going in different directions

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: leave that to us. We will feed her cake and calm her down

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
